release_notes: Adaptive order sizing, profitability advisor, position management (Hold-Only/AI Managed/Ignore), event-awareness for earnings, settings revamp with cycle cost chip, broker-validated symbol picker, expanded onboarding, and 24/7 reliability hardening.

whats_new: Adaptive order sizing: Auto (% of balance) and Fixed cap modes
Profitability advisor per broker with break-even analysis
Position management: Hold-Only, AI Managed, and Ignore modes
Earnings event-awareness with Finnhub calendar integration
Broker-validated symbol picker in watchlist settings
bug_fixes: Settings cycle cost chip shows live API cost estimates
Onboarding step 4 profitability chip and step 7 sizing prefs
Clean-state defaults: paper mode, onboarding reset on fresh install
performance: Adaptive balance-aware sizing prevents oversized orders
